name: Alex
bio:
I fell in love with fitness at a young age through sports, where I first discovered the power of movement, discipline, and self-improvement. That early spark grew into a deep passion for the process, pushing both the mind and body to new levels. It’s a mindset I carried throughout my time as a college football player, competitive bodybuilder, and now as a coach and trainer.
I bring a focused, results-driven approach to help individuals reach their highest potential. Whether you're just beginning your journey or chasing your next level, I'm passionate about helping you uncover your “WHY” and using it as the foundation for lasting progress.

mapping.Name: alex
mapping.Bio:
i fell in love with fitness at a young age through sports, where i first discovered the power of movement, discipline, and self-improvement. that early spark grew into a deep passion for the process, pushing both the mind and body to new levels. it’s a mindset i carried throughout my time as a college football player, competitive bodybuilder, and now as a coach and trainer.
i bring a focused, results-driven approach to help individuals reach their highest potential. whether you're just beginning your journey or chasing your next level, i'm passionate about helping you uncover your “why” and using it as the foundation for lasting progress.

name: Ashley
bio: My passion for health and fitness began when I discovered how empowering it feels to build both physical and mental strength in a sustainable way. Combining strength training with Pilates, I help clients feel confident, capable, and deeply connected to their bodies. My mission is to guide others in building sustainable habits and lasting strength — inside and out.

mapping.Name: ashley
mapping.Bio: my passion for health and fitness began when i discovered how empowering it feels to build both physical and mental strength in a sustainable way. combining strength training with pilates, i help clients feel confident, capable, and deeply connected to their bodies. my mission is to guide others in building sustainable habits and lasting strength — inside and out.

name: Ben
bio: I excel in corrective exercise and behavior change, helping clients move better and feel stronger. I’ll challenge anyone at the level they want to be challenged, whether they’re building foundational strength or pushing their athletic potential. With 12 years of experience and over 10 certifications, I’ve helped more than 1,000 clients achieve real, lasting results, and I’m committed to helping you do the same!

mapping.Name: ben
mapping.Bio: i excel in corrective exercise and behavior change, helping clients move better and feel stronger. i’ll challenge anyone at the level they want to be challenged, whether they’re building foundational strength or pushing their athletic potential. with 12 years of experience and over 10 certifications, i’ve helped more than 1,000 clients achieve real, lasting results, and i’m committed to helping you do the same!

name: Carolyn
bio: Carolyn is a comprehensive Peak Pilates L1 classical Pilates instructor and NASM Certified Personal Trainer who specializes in coaching women out of their comfort zone and into transformation. After having her first child, she discovered the substantial physical and mental benefits of consistent classical Pilates practice including: improved bodily awareness, posture, alignment, mobility, hip and pelvic stability, deep core engagement, and even pain relief. Her favorite Reformer Pilates exercise is "Climb A Tree."

mapping.Name: carolyn
mapping.Bio: carolyn is a comprehensive peak pilates l1 classical pilates instructor and nasm certified personal trainer who specializes in coaching women out of their comfort zone and into transformation. after having her first child, she discovered the substantial physical and mental benefits of consistent classical pilates practice including: improved bodily awareness, posture, alignment, mobility, hip and pelvic stability, deep core engagement, and even pain relief. her favorite reformer pilates exercise is "climb a tree."

name: Daphne
bio: I’m an engineering professional turned personal trainer, blending over two decades of problem-solving and precision with a lifelong passion for movement, running, and strength training. After 20+ years in the tech world, I decided to take my love for fitness beyond my own routines and use it to help others achieve their goals. I believe that strength, mobility, and endurance aren’t just about performance—they’re about living fully. My approach to training focuses on sustainable progress, injury prevention, and building confidence through movement. Whether it’s preparing for a marathon, improving daily function, or rediscovering the joy of exercise, I love helping people unlock what their bodies are truly capable of.

mapping.Name: daphne
mapping.Bio: i’m an engineering professional turned personal trainer, blending over two decades of problem-solving and precision with a lifelong passion for movement, running, and strength training. after 20+ years in the tech world, i decided to take my love for fitness beyond my own routines and use it to help others achieve their goals. i believe that strength, mobility, and endurance aren’t just about performance—they’re about living fully. my approach to training focuses on sustainable progress, injury prevention, and building confidence through movement. whether it’s preparing for a marathon, improving daily function, or rediscovering the joy of exercise, i love helping people unlock what their bodies are truly capable of.

name: Dave
bio: I have been helping clients reach their health and fitness goals since 2002, with specialties in improved movements, longevity, nutrition (especially in nutritional supplements), assisted stretching, as well as improving lifestyle behaviors. Helping people recompose their bodies and get stronger without being super restrictive or giving up their lives for the gym is what I do best, simply by teaching proper movement patterns and making better choices for themselves. What can I do for you? I can teach you about the benefits of strength training and nutrition to reach your goals in a sustainable way, while building a future where you can live pain free into your golden years.

mapping.Name: dave
mapping.Bio: i have been helping clients reach their health and fitness goals since 2002, with specialties in improved movements, longevity, nutrition (especially in nutritional supplements), assisted stretching, as well as improving lifestyle behaviors. helping people recompose their bodies and get stronger without being super restrictive or giving up their lives for the gym is what i do best, simply by teaching proper movement patterns and making better choices for themselves. what can i do for you? i can teach you about the benefits of strength training and nutrition to reach your goals in a sustainable way, while building a future where you can live pain free into your golden years.

name: Emily N.
bio: Whether you are looking to develop new habits or optimize your current routine, I implement a personalized approach to training, nutrition, and recovery to build health and wellness into your busy life. When working with me, there is no guesswork on your end, it's just a matter of showing up and executing! Let's get to work!

mapping.Name: emily n.
mapping.Bio: whether you are looking to develop new habits or optimize your current routine, i implement a personalized approach to training, nutrition, and recovery to build health and wellness into your busy life. when working with me, there is no guesswork on your end, it's just a matter of showing up and executing! let's get to work!

name: Eric
bio: My mission is to provide long term superior health, fitness and lifestyle coaching to meet your needs. My training encompasses soft tissue, mobility, movement-based warmup, strength training power and cardiovascular exercises that are set up properly for you and your goals.  I've worked with all walks of life but especially enjoy bettering athletes and anyone who I can assist in improving their performance, body composition and achieving a healthier lifestyle.  No matter what you do or current fitness level, I continue to evolve and use simple progressive principles to enhance your longevity.

mapping.Name: eric
mapping.Bio: my mission is to provide long term superior health, fitness and lifestyle coaching to meet your needs. my training encompasses soft tissue, mobility, movement-based warmup, strength training power and cardiovascular exercises that are set up properly for you and your goals.  i've worked with all walks of life but especially enjoy bettering athletes and anyone who i can assist in improving their performance, body composition and achieving a healthier lifestyle.  no matter what you do or current fitness level, i continue to evolve and use simple progressive principles to enhance your longevity.

name: Greg
bio: Quality of movement is the key to avoid the pitfalls of a sedentary lifestyle. Along with a healthy diet, optimal sleep and a positive outlook, we can avoid injury, build muscle and live a fulfilling and active life!

mapping.Name: greg
mapping.Bio: quality of movement is the key to avoid the pitfalls of a sedentary lifestyle. along with a healthy diet, optimal sleep and a positive outlook, we can avoid injury, build muscle and live a fulfilling and active life!

name: Joe
bio: I'm Joe! I grew up in San Diego and spent summers with my family in the north shore of MA. 3 years ago , after meeting the love of my life during a family visit, I decided to move here. I served in the Marine Corps for 4 years and worked various jobs before deciding to pursue my passion as a personal trainer in 2021. I love training clients as well as myself, trail running, hiking, camping, and being a local tourist!

mapping.Name: joe
mapping.Bio: i'm joe! i grew up in san diego and spent summers with my family in the north shore of ma. 3 years ago , after meeting the love of my life during a family visit, i decided to move here. i served in the marine corps for 4 years and worked various jobs before deciding to pursue my passion as a personal trainer in 2021. i love training clients as well as myself, trail running, hiking, camping, and being a local tourist!

name: Laya
bio: Hi! I’m Laya, a NASM-Certified Personal Trainer passionate about helping people feel stronger, healthier, and more confident. I specialize in bodybuilding, fat loss, strength training, mobility, and corrective exercise, using a science-based approach to create sustainable results. With additional training in FMS and degrees in Exersise Science and Sports Coaching, I prioritize proper form, injury prevention, and building a strong foundation for long-term success. I create personalized programs and am especially passionate about empowering women to step into their strength—inside and outside the gym!

mapping.Name: laya
mapping.Bio: hi! i’m laya, a nasm-certified personal trainer passionate about helping people feel stronger, healthier, and more confident. i specialize in bodybuilding, fat loss, strength training, mobility, and corrective exercise, using a science-based approach to create sustainable results. with additional training in fms and degrees in exersise science and sports coaching, i prioritize proper form, injury prevention, and building a strong foundation for long-term success. i create personalized programs and am especially passionate about empowering women to step into their strength—inside and outside the gym!

name: Lily
bio: “I’ve been a trainer for 10 years and love helping weight-loss clients and new moms build strength and confidence. In addition to personal training, I am also certified in Pilates and stretch. If you want to lift weights, feel great, and have fun while doing it, I’m your gal!”

mapping.Name: lily
mapping.Bio: “i’ve been a trainer for 10 years and love helping weight-loss clients and new moms build strength and confidence. in addition to personal training, i am also certified in pilates and stretch. if you want to lift weights, feel great, and have fun while doing it, i’m your gal!”

name: Maya
bio: Hi! My name is Maya, and I’m a Pilates instructor here at Life Time Burlington. My number one goal as an instructor is to have clients leave the studio feeling better than when they walked in—whether that’s mentally, physically, or in any other way. My background is in engineering, but I’ve always had a passion for biomechanics and understanding how the body moves. I love building meaningful relationships with my clients and creating a welcoming, supportive community within the studio.

mapping.Name: maya
mapping.Bio: hi! my name is maya, and i’m a pilates instructor here at life time burlington. my number one goal as an instructor is to have clients leave the studio feeling better than when they walked in—whether that’s mentally, physically, or in any other way. my background is in engineering, but i’ve always had a passion for biomechanics and understanding how the body moves. i love building meaningful relationships with my clients and creating a welcoming, supportive community within the studio.

name: Megan
bio: My name is Megan and I come with 25 years of fitness experience in training, coaching, competing and teaching. One of my favorite things to do is sing and my most favorite food in the world is bacon!

mapping.Name: megan
mapping.Bio: my name is megan and i come with 25 years of fitness experience in training, coaching, competing and teaching. one of my favorite things to do is sing and my most favorite food in the world is bacon!

name: Michelle
bio: With 20 years of gym experience and 13 years of boxing, I like to bring the kind of energy to our workouts that keeps things fun! Whatever your fitness goals are (strength, weight loss, balance, mobility), exercising should never feel like a chore. Let's get together and make a plan to get you where you want to be!

mapping.Name: michelle
mapping.Bio: with 20 years of gym experience and 13 years of boxing, i like to bring the kind of energy to our workouts that keeps things fun! whatever your fitness goals are (strength, weight loss, balance, mobility), exercising should never feel like a chore. let's get together and make a plan to get you where you want to be!

name: Nevin
bio: I have been a personal trainer here at lifetime Burlington going on 4 years now. I work with many different styles of clients: pre/post/during injury, athletes (mostly golf but also lacrosse, skiing/snowboarding), and general functional strength training are my specialties. My goal with my clients is to get them to reach goals they didn't even think were possible in the way the feel, the way they move and the way they perform. I went to school at UVM and studied nutrition and food sciences.I also enjoy golfing, snowboarding, lacrosse, hiking, running, weightlifting, reading and meditating!

mapping.Name: nevin
mapping.Bio: i have been a personal trainer here at lifetime burlington going on 4 years now. i work with many different styles of clients: pre/post/during injury, athletes (mostly golf but also lacrosse, skiing/snowboarding), and general functional strength training are my specialties. my goal with my clients is to get them to reach goals they didn't even think were possible in the way the feel, the way they move and the way they perform. i went to school at uvm and studied nutrition and food sciences.i also enjoy golfing, snowboarding, lacrosse, hiking, running, weightlifting, reading and meditating!

name: Pat
bio: Growing up in sports and having family members in amateur bodybuilding, health and fitness, I dreamt of being in the field and making an impact. After a decade in high tech and information technology I decided to make a lifestyle change and completely turned my health around when I reached the heights of my obesity at 305 lbs. I decided I needed to pursue what I was born to do and 10 years now in fitness I couldn't be happier! Being in customer service all of my life, my desire to help others is like second nature. After changing my life, dropping more than 90 lbs, and living my dream- I have been on a mission to help others reach their health and fitness goals, change their life and feel great in the process! Contact me today and let's get after it!

mapping.Name: pat
mapping.Bio: growing up in sports and having family members in amateur bodybuilding, health and fitness, i dreamt of being in the field and making an impact. after a decade in high tech and information technology i decided to make a lifestyle change and completely turned my health around when i reached the heights of my obesity at 305 lbs. i decided i needed to pursue what i was born to do and 10 years now in fitness i couldn't be happier! being in customer service all of my life, my desire to help others is like second nature. after changing my life, dropping more than 90 lbs, and living my dream- i have been on a mission to help others reach their health and fitness goals, change their life and feel great in the process! contact me today and let's get after it!

name: Sara
bio: My journey in the fitness industry began about 10 years ago and over that time l've learned that lasting physical change starts with a mental shift. In my sessions, I guide clients to create a balance between movement, nutrition, and overall well-being to help them feel their best. I bring a positive, go-get-'em attitude to every session, offering the right balance of encouragement and push to help you achieve your goals.

mapping.Name: sara
mapping.Bio: my journey in the fitness industry began about 10 years ago and over that time l've learned that lasting physical change starts with a mental shift. in my sessions, i guide clients to create a balance between movement, nutrition, and overall well-being to help them feel their best. i bring a positive, go-get-'em attitude to every session, offering the right balance of encouragement and push to help you achieve your goals.

name: Scott
bio: I’ve always loved staying active, but for a long time, I didn’t feel truly strong. After a knee injury, I realized I needed a smarter, more balanced way to train. That’s when everything changed. Now, I blend strength training, mobility work, and mindful cardio to help people move better, feel stronger, and enjoy fitness again. With multiple certifications in exercise and nutrition, my goal is simple — to help others build healthy, resilient bodies that feel good every day.

mapping.Name: scott
mapping.Bio: i’ve always loved staying active, but for a long time, i didn’t feel truly strong. after a knee injury, i realized i needed a smarter, more balanced way to train. that’s when everything changed. now, i blend strength training, mobility work, and mindful cardio to help people move better, feel stronger, and enjoy fitness again. with multiple certifications in exercise and nutrition, my goal is simple — to help others build healthy, resilient bodies that feel good every day.

name: Taylor
bio: As a lifelong dancer and certified Pilates instructor, I believe in the transformative power of movement to heal, strengthen, and sustain the body. I teach Pilates not just as exercise, but as a pathway to deeper physical awareness and long-term health. I recently graduated from The Ohio State University with a BFA in dance and I love music, baking, crafts and thrifting!

mapping.Name: taylor
mapping.Bio: as a lifelong dancer and certified pilates instructor, i believe in the transformative power of movement to heal, strengthen, and sustain the body. i teach pilates not just as exercise, but as a pathway to deeper physical awareness and long-term health. i recently graduated from the ohio state university with a bfa in dance and i love music, baking, crafts and thrifting!

name: Tess
bio: With over 25 years of experience, I help clients feel confident, supported, and strong through safe, effective personal training. I create an encouraging environment where goals feel achievable and workouts are never intimidating. As a dedicated Pilates instructor, I integrate core strength, posture, and mobility work to help clients move and feel their best.
